scripts.eas-build-post-install:
set -e; echo '[post-install] cwd='$(pwd); APP_ROOT=$(pwd); WORKSPACE_ROOT=$(cd .. && pwd); echo '[post-install] app root: '$APP_ROOT; echo '[post-install] workspace root: '$WORKSPACE_ROOT; echo '[post-install] writing .env.production from EAS env'; : ${API_BASE_URL:?missing in EAS env}; : ${IMAGEKIT_URL:?missing in EAS env}; : ${IMAGEKIT_PUBLIC_KEY:?missing in EAS env}; printf 'NODE_ENV=production
API_BASE_URL=%s
IMAGEKIT_URL=%s
IMAGEKIT_PUBLIC_KEY=%s
' "$API_BASE_URL" "$IMAGEKIT_URL" "$IMAGEKIT_PUBLIC_KEY" > "$APP_ROOT/.env.production"; echo '[post-install] .env.production written:'; cat "$APP_ROOT/.env.production"; mkdir -p "$APP_ROOT/ios"; if [ -f "$APP_ROOT/.env.schema" ]; then cp "$APP_ROOT/.env.schema" "$APP_ROOT/ios/.env.schema"; elif [ -f "$WORKSPACE_ROOT/.env.schema" ]; then cp "$WORKSPACE_ROOT/.env.schema" "$APP_ROOT/ios/.env.schema"; else echo '[post-install] WARNING: no .env.schema found in app root or workspace root'; fi; cp "$APP_ROOT/.env.production" "$APP_ROOT/ios/.env.production"; echo '[post-install] staged env files in ios/'; npm --prefix "$WORKSPACE_ROOT" run build -w @birdogey/shared
